summary: Excellent soundboard recording with super‑crisp audio, though the concert itself isn’t discussed.
review: Both reviewers give this tape five stars, praising the pristine, crisp quality of the soundboard source and noting a clean transfer chain. No comments are made about the musical performance or setlist, so the analysis focuses on the high‑fidelity recording.

ai_rating.rationale: All reviews are five‑star and uniformly praise the crystal‑clear soundboard capture; with no negative show comments, the overall rating is near the top of the scale.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the audio as "super crisp" and detail a clean digital transfer chain (Tascam DA‑20 → Sound Devices 744T → Samplitude → FLAC).
